cases.scenario: Customer search endpoint bypasses pagination and switches to contains query
cases.business_context: 客服希望模糊搜索所有 Owner，直接把分页查询改成了 contains + 全量列表返回。

cases.scenario: Owner update flow removes URL and payload identity consistency check
cases.business_context: 为了兼容前端改造，更新 Owner 时去掉了 URL ownerId 与表单 id 的一致性校验。

patch_operations.description: Remove owner id mismatch guard before save.

cases.scenario: Vet HTML list endpoint abandons pagination and loads all records
cases.business_context: 诊所后台希望导出全部医生列表，直接把 HTML 页接口改成一次性查全表。

cases.scenario: Course creation bypasses aggregate factory and drops domain event recording
cases.business_context: 课程创建流程为了绕过一个构造器问题，直接 new Course，跳过了 aggregate factory 与领域事件录制。

patch_operations.description: Instantiate the aggregate directly instead of using the factory.

cases.scenario: Domain events consumer removes SQL LIMIT and scans the full outbox each loop
cases.business_context: 事件消费端为了一次性追平 backlog，去掉了每批 200 条限制，导致循环内查询不再受控。

patch_operations.description: Remove SQL limit and chunk parameter.

cases.scenario: Criteria exact match is widened into contains search for shared filters
cases.business_context: 共享查询层为了复用 contains 逻辑，把精确匹配也改成了 like %%value%%，扩大了查询结果面。

patch_operations.description: Broaden exact match into contains semantics.
